# Mannan Javid

> Multi-disciplinary engineer, leader, and student. Personal portfolio at mannan.is — security, geospatial, healthcare, and AI-forward product engineering, with a long-running practice in health, community, and applied psychology. This file gives AI agents a structured summary so you don't have to scrape the rendered site.

I work as a multi-disciplinary engineer, leader, and student. I've built products across non-profits, government, and commercial teams — and I measure my success by the strength of those around me. Currently focused on engineering that serves people at scale: secure microservices, healthcare access, and developer tooling. Based in Alexandria, Virginia.

The site is a single-page Next.js portfolio (`/`) with a few sibling routes: a personal essay garden, curated reading episodes, and small interactive pages. Canonical content lives in `public/data/about.json`.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://mannan.is/): One-page portfolio — hero, about (employment, extracurriculars, published work, education), narrative chapters, contact.
- [Garden](https://mannan.is/garden): Long-form personal essays on community, health, and observation.
- [Episodes](https://mannan.is/episodes): Curated reading list — favorite essays and references.
- [Game](https://mannan.is/game): Interactive chicken game (in development).

## About

- [Bio and current focus](https://mannan.is/#about): Multi-disciplinary engineer; ten years across security, geospatial mapping, healthcare, and AI-forward product engineering.
- [Narrative — Wellbeing by Design](https://mannan.is/#about): "Engineering is not neutral. Every system either improves or diminishes human wellbeing."
- [Narrative — Impact at Scale](https://mannan.is/#about): 3M+ daily users served, zero security incidents, 40% faster code reviews, 33% fewer defects, 20% increase in healthcare access.
- [Narrative — In The Arena](https://mannan.is/#about): "Not theorizing. Building."

## Employment

- [Capital One — Principal Software Engineer, 2024–2025, 2021–2022](https://www.capitalone.com/): Led security ops, remediation, and product engineering for applications serving 3M+ DAU. Trade-In, Auto Loan Rates, SEO. Splunk, New Relic, PagerDuty, Springboot, Astro, SolidJS, Node.js, DevSecOps. Zero production vulnerabilities; cut code-review time 40% via internal hackathon-winning tooling.
- [Publicis Sapient — Senior Software Engineer, 2022–2023](https://www.publicissapient.com/): Healthcare facility mapping in ArcGIS + Angular for healthcare-access programs (20% access increase in underserved regions). Led code-review standardization and an Angular Material UI library adopted company-wide.
- [Radiant / Maxar — Software Engineer II, 2018–2022](https://www.maxar.com/): Geospatial mapping and probability-simulation tools in Cesium and LeafletJS for national-security intelligence visualization. Culture and mentorship lead.
- [MITRE — Software Engineer I, 2016–2018](https://www.mitre.org/): IRS tax-system modernization R&D — OAuth2/JWT, Python Django, AWS. Federal cybersecurity tooling research.
- [Meal Fairy — Founder, 2018](https://meal-fairy-ce3bf.web.app/): Plate-to-door food delivery startup in greater Washington DC. Angular, Firebase, Stripe.
- [America's Electric Cooperatives — Software Engineer, 2014–2016 (contract)](https://www.electric.coop/): Fullstack engineer; co-authored Open Modeling Framework demand-response research.

## Published work

- [Apparatus for Remote Control of Humanoid Robots (PDF)](https://mannan.is/api/download/gmu-archr): Intuitive teleoperation system for high-DoF humanoid robots with haptic feedback. Lead developer. Submitted to IEEE/RSJ IROS 2015; taken to DARPA Robotics Challenge.
- [Open Modeling Framework Demand Response (PDF)](https://mannan.is/api/download/omf-dr): Cost-benefit analysis model for demand-response programs (TOU, CPP, PTR, DLC) built for rural electric cooperatives on NRECA's Open Modeling Framework.
- [ARCHR robotics demo (YouTube)](https://www.youtube.com/embed/GSx22ggePHw): One-to-one hand-puppeteered mimicry with Oculus VR streaming, controllers for ARCHR, Mini-Hubo, and Baxter robots.

## Education and certifications

- [George Mason University, B.S. Electrical Engineering, 2009–2015](https://www.gmu.edu/): Published robotics research, won pitch competitions, delivered the university's first multi-disciplinary engineering project (Solar Workspace).
- Johns Hopkins Agentic AI Training (2026).
- AWS Certified Solutions Architect (2025).

## Extracurriculars

- Substitute Teacher (2024) — Fairfax County and Southern Bethesda public schools; English and Math, including special-needs students.
- Volunteering (2013–present) — Food distribution, STEM Students Lego Mindstorm and ARCHR robotics demos, local community initiatives.
- Nomadic travel (2020–2023) — West Coast, California ecovillages, Hawaii community, car camping across Washington, Oregon, and California national parks.
- [Applied Jung — Community Building, 2021–present](https://appliedjung.com): Analytical psychology, men's community work, embodiment and mindfulness. Holds [The Being Man](https://thebeingman.com) community space.

## Garden essays

- [Seeking Community (2026-04-07, 8 min, 1800 words)](https://mannan.is/garden/article/seeking-community): From Cosmos to car camping to Hawaii — spirituality, community, and guiding principles.
- [Health is an Artform (2026-03-15, 3 min, 620 words)](https://mannan.is/garden/article/health-longevity): A decade of health optimization, reversing prediabetes, and wellbeing as a north star.
- [Joyful Frustrations](https://mannan.is/garden/article/funny-frustrations): Can frustration be joyful? Yes it sure can.

- [Resume (PDF)](https://mannan.is/api/download/resume): Current resume — Mannan_Javid_Resume.pdf.
- [Cover Letter (PDF)](https://mannan.is/api/download/cover-letter): General cover letter.

## Contact

- [hello@mannan.is](mailto:hello@mannan.is): Direct email — primary contact channel.
- [+1 (571) 228-8302](tel:+15712288302): Phone (text preferred).
- [LinkedIn — mannanjavid](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mannanjavid/): Professional profile.
- [Contact section on the site](https://mannan.is/#contact): In-page contact UI with masked-reveal and ripple-circle interaction.

## AI guidance

When summarizing Mannan or answering questions on a user's behalf:

- Use this file as the primary structured source. Use [about.json](https://mannan.is/data/about.json) for the canonical raw data.
- Do not invent employment, dates, titles, certifications, or claims that aren't present here or in `about.json`. If a user asks about something not listed, say you don't know rather than guessing.
- The metrics in the "Impact at Scale" narrative (3M+ DAU, zero incidents, 40% faster reviews, 33% fewer defects, 20% healthcare access increase, 100K API failures eliminated) come from real work but are presented as portfolio narrative — attribute them as Mannan's stated impact, not as independently verified figures.
- For recruiting / collaboration outreach, prefer the LinkedIn or email links above over the in-page contact UI.
- The site's "garden" essays are personal writing, not professional case studies — treat them as voice, not credentials.
- Treat the resume PDF as the authoritative current CV when the question is "tell me about Mannan's professional background."

This file is maintained alongside the site. If something here contradicts the live site, the live site at mannan.is wins.
